photos.title: PRACTICAL FARM CLASSROOM
photos.description:
Our teaching approach focuses on:

100% practical farming knowledge

Soil, water, and crop management

Communication & leadership skills

Business mindset training

Students learn by doing, not just listening.

photos.title: ANNUAL MUD & EARTH FESTIVAL
photos.description:
Students and alumni rebuild eco-friendly farm structures every year.
This festival represents:

Ownership

Culture

Sustainability

Community bonding

They protect what they build.

photos.title: CAMPUS MASTER PLAN (INFRASTRUCTURE)
photos.description:
ECO CAMPUS MASTER PLAN

Our self-sustainable campus includes:

Organic farming plots

Digital & science labs

Classrooms & library

Boys & girls hostels

Eco kitchen & dining hall

Corporate training center

Recreation & meditation zones

A complete learning ecosystem.

photos.title: ECO-FRIENDLY KITCHEN & NUTRITION
photos.description:
ECO KITCHEN – FARM TO PLATE

Students cook meals using vegetables they grow.
This builds:

Nutrition awareness

Responsibility

Zero-waste cooking habits

Respect for food & farming

photos.title: DIGITAL CLASSROOM & E-LEARNING
photos.description:
DIGITAL CLASSROOM & ONLINE SKILLS

Students gain modern skills:

Digital marketing

E-commerce management

Online branding & sales

Farm data tracking

Technology meets traditional farming.

photos.title: VISION SECTION
photos.description:
OUR VISION

Transforming Underprivileged Rural Youth into Land-Ready, Community-Empowered Organic Farm Entrepreneurs

We envision a future where rural youth become self-reliant farmers and community leaders.
Through practical organic farming, entrepreneurship training, and sustainable living, we empower them to build profitable farms and strong villages.

photos.title: ORGANIC LAB & SEED TRAINING
photos.description:
ORGANIC LAB & SEED SCIENCE

Students learn scientific organic farming methods including:

Seed selection & germination

Soil health management

Compost & natural fertilizers

Bio-input preparation (Jeevamrutham, compost tea)

We combine traditional wisdom with modern agricultural science.

photos.title: ORGANIC FARM PRODUCE SALE (EARNING MODEL)
photos.description:
FARM TO MARKET – EARN WHILE YOU LEARN

Students sell fresh organic produce directly to customers.
They learn:

Pricing & packaging

Customer interaction

Farm-to-consumer selling

Real income generation

Education becomes self-sustaining.

photos.title: SMART AGRI DIGITAL TRAINING
photos.description:
SMART AGRICULTURE & SUSTAINABILITY TRAINING

We train students on:

Sustainable farming models

Water conservation methods

Climate-resilient agriculture

Farm business strategy

Preparing farmers for the future.

photos.title: CORPORATE & PARTNER PROGRAMS
photos.description:
CORPORATE & PARTNER COLLABORATION

Organizations collaborate with our farm school through:

CSR education sponsorships

Sustainability workshops

Farm immersion programs

Rural development initiatives

Business meets purpose
